name: pawmo
flavor_texts: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks.
Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.
text: Pawmo is the Mouse Pokémon. It is a electric and fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: volt-absorb, natural-cure, iron-fist (hidden). Base stats — HP: 60, Attack: 75, Defense: 40, Sp. Atk: 50, Sp. Def: 40, Speed: 85. Evolution line: pawmi → pawmo → pawmot. Lore: When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks. Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.
